TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: KA rou samamala ta ti Jesus, ni-d'marang ki Kouva ki ta-tamd-den ki Alid, ka ni-iroua tyni-an ta Pahtatautauughan tyn, tou pakita-eih tyni-æn ki ni-peitallagh ki Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid.
KA rou samamala ta ti Jesus, ni-d'marang ki Kouva ki ta-tamd-den ki Alid, ka ni-iroua tyni-an ta Pahtatautauughan tyn, tou pakita-eih tyni-æn ki ni-peitallagh ki Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid.
S.TRANS: E be Jesus gingh upt ende bertrock ban den Tempel ende stjne Discipelen quamen by hem om hem de gebouwen des Tempels te toonen. |
And Jesus went out, and departed from the temple: and his disciples came to him for to shew him the buildings of the temple.
耶穌出了聖殿，正走的時候，門徒進前來，把殿宇指給他看。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi-moumi kaua ararau-en tamamang katta? Missing koun-nau-kamou, Assi pæ-itoukoua-eih hia ta [sasasat kavahto pa-itou-halap ki vahto [ka rouma,] ka assi taktak-auh.
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi-moumi kaua ararau-en tamamang katta? Missing koun-nau-kamou, Assi pæ-itoukoua-eih hia ta [sasasat kavahto pa-itou-halap ki vahto [ka rouma,] ka assi taktak-auh.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus seyde tot haer En fiet ghy niet alle dese dingen:Doorwaer segge ick Dier en sal niet [eenen] ficen op den (anderen] steen gelaten worden die niet afgebroken en sal worden.
And Jesus said unto them, See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
耶穌對他們說：「你們不是看見這殿宇嗎？我實在告訴你們，將來在這裏沒有一塊石頭留在石頭上，不被拆毀了。」 （可13‧3－13；路21‧7－19）

S.FORM: Irou ka mieroung ta teni tou voukkyn ka makka-vavoua ki imagh, ni-moukoua tou snnegh tyni-æn ta Pahtatautau'han, ka ni k'ma, kananan'ei-kame, manno-al-ato ki kidi ta mamang katta? ka kamang-al-ato ta pou kidi-en ki kaännanoung oho, ki sah-kaha'n sa-limou-lymmou-appa ki ydda rynnoughan?

Irou ka mieroung ta teni tou voukkyn ka makka-vavoua ki imagh, ni-moukoua tou snnegh tyni-æn ta Pahtatautau'han, ka ni k'ma, kananan'ei-kame, manno-al-ato ki kidi ta mamang katta? ka kamang-al-ato ta pou kidi-en ki kaännanoung oho, ki sah-kaha'n sa-limou-lymmou-appa ki ydda rynnoughan?
S.TRANS: Ende als hy op den Olit-berg geseten was gingen de Dilcipelen tot hem alleen seggende Segt ons wanneer sullen dese dingen 3yn + ende welck [sal] het teecken [rijo] ban uwe tockomle ende ban de bolepndinge der werelt $
And as he sat upon the mount of Olives, the disciples came unto him privately, saying, Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the end of the world?
耶穌在橄欖山上坐着，門徒暗暗地來說：「請告訴我們，甚麼時候有這些事？你降臨和世界的末了有甚麼預兆呢？」

S.FORM: Irou ka mattæ i-vlli ta ti Je-sus ni-k'ma neini-æn, K'ytt'ei, ka assi pataurahei-ah ta timamang ymoumi-æn.
Irou ka mattæ i-vlli ta ti Je-sus ni-k'ma neini-æn, K'ytt'ei, ka assi pataurahei-ah ta timamang ymoumi-æn.
S.TRANS: EndeFJesus antwoordende sepde tot haer Siet toe dat n niemant en berlepde.
And Jesus answered and said unto them, Take heed that no man deceive you.
耶穌回答說：「你們要謹慎，免得有人迷惑你們。

S.FORM: Ka mabatoung ta irou'ah tou Nanang-au, ka k'ma-ah, Ti jau ta ti. hristus, ka pataurahei-auh nein ta ta'ou ka madagh.
Ka mabatoung ta irou'ah tou Nanang-au, ka k'ma-ah, Ti jau ta ti. hristus, ka pataurahei-auh nein ta ta'ou ka madagh.
S.TRANS: Want bele sullen komen onde: mynen Name seggende Ick ben de Chailtus ende sy sullen bele berleyden.
For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
因為將來有好些人冒我的名來，說：『我是基督』，並且要迷惑許多人。

S.FORM: Ka illingigh-au-moumi ta pasacyt-an, ki ikalauakau-en-appa ki pasacyt-an. Kmytta, ka assi-ah-kamou rou pa-ouh kiap-en, ka ki-di-ato ka pavut-auh ta mamang k'atta, râ aousi-appa ki limou-limou.
Ka illingigh-au-moumi ta pasacyt-an, ki ikalauakau-en-appa ki pasacyt-an. Kmytta, ka assi-ah-kamou rou pa-ouh kiap-en, ka ki-di-ato ka pavut-auh ta mamang k'atta, râ aousi-appa ki limou-limou.
S.TRANS: Ende ghp sult hooren ban oorlogen ende geruchten ban oorlogen. Siet toe en wordt niet besichrickt want alle [die] dingen moeten geschieden mae noch en het eynde niet,
And ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars: see that ye be not troubled: for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
你們也要聽見打仗和打仗的風聲，總不要驚慌；因為這些事是必須有的，只是末期還沒有到。

S.FORM: Ka æhpit-ah ta ta'u mou-dumma ki tau, ta Peisasou-an-appa makou-douma ki Peisasou-an: ka irouah ki kahangei-an, ki pis-ma-mourang-en, ki nynnough tou manninni ki yttou-koua-an,
Ka æhpit-ah ta ta'u mou-dumma ki tau, ta Peisasou-an-appa makou-douma ki Peisasou-an: ka irouah ki kahangei-an, ki pis-ma-mourang-en, ki nynnough tou manninni ki yttou-koua-an,
S.TRANS: Want het [een] bolck fal tegen Het [ander] bolck opstaen ende t [ een J konmckriick tegen het [ander] Koninckryck : ende daer ullen 3yn hongers-nooden ei pestilentien ende aertbebingen in berfchepden plaetsen.
For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in divers places.
民要攻打民，國要攻打國；多處必有饑荒、地震。

S.FORM: Nda kamamang k'atta dyk ka naunamou ki pæ'i-alalam-en.
Nda kamamang k'atta dyk ka naunamou ki pæ'i-alalam-en.
S.TRANS: Doch alle dese dingen [zijn maer] cen beginsel der tmerten. _
All these are the beginning of sorrows.
這都是災難的起頭。

S.FORM: Tou kidi-k'anna paä-toun-noun-ah ymoumi-æn tou sasamk-an, ka pakapatei-ah ymoumi-een ka 'aal-auh-kamou ki ymmid ki ta'utaou alei ki Nanang-au.
Tou kidi-k'anna paä-toun-noun-ah ymoumi-æn tou sasamk-an, ka pakapatei-ah ymoumi-een ka 'aal-auh-kamou ki ymmid ki ta'utaou alei ki Nanang-au.
S.TRANS: Alfdan sullen sy u oberteberen in berdruckinge ende fullen u dooden ende gy sult. gehaet wordt ban alle bolkeren om mijns Naems wille.
Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall kill you: and ye shall be hated of all nations for my name's sake.
那時，人要把你們陷在患難裏，也要殺害你們；你們又要為我的名被萬民恨惡。

S.FORM: Ka tou kidi kanna paka varau-auh ta madad-agh[ki vouel,] ka ma-pæ-vlivlli-ah mapa - mado mapa a tounnou tounnoun, kamakka-v'llivlli-ah makka-mado makka-vahiehyr neini-æn.
Ka tou kidi kanna paka varau-auh ta madad-agh[ki vouel,] ka ma-pæ-vlivlli-ah mapa - mado mapa a tounnou tounnoun, kamakka-v'llivlli-ah makka-mado makka-vahiehyr neini-æn.
S.TRANS: Ende dan sullender bele ge-ergert worden ende fullen malkanderen oberleberen ende malkanderen haten, .
And then shall many be offended, and shall betray one another, and shall hate one another.
那時，必有許多人跌倒，也要彼此陷害，彼此恨惡；

S.FORM: Ka 'æhpit-ah ta mabat-oung ka assi dlligh ka Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka pataurahei-auh nein ta madadagh ki ta'u.
Ka 'æhpit-ah ta mabatoung ka assi dlligh ka Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka pataurahei-auh nein ta madadagh ki ta'u.
S.TRANS: Ende bele baltchePropheten sullen opstaen- ende tullende; bele berlepden, |
And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many.
且有好些假先知起來，迷惑多人。

S.FORM: Ka alei-appa ki pakæuhta-pang-auh ta katoukoul-an, ka hi-oup-eih ki væango ki madadagh ki ta'u.
Ka alei-appa ki pakæuhta-pang-auh ta katoukoul-an, ka hi-oup-eih ki væango ki madadagh ki ta'u.
S.TRANS: Endeom dat de ongerechtigheyt bermenighbuldight al worden soo sal de lietde ban bele berkouden.
And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.
只因不法的事增多，許多人的愛心才漸漸冷淡了。

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta itou-tara-eugh tou limou-appa, pakariang auh ta komma-hynna.
Ka timamang ta itou-tara-eugh tou limou-appa, pakariang auh ta komma-hynna.
S.TRANS: Marr wie bolherden fal tot den epnde diesal sahigh worden.
But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
惟有忍耐到底的，必然得救。

S.FORM: Ka pattasasou-eih ta Ha gnau ka mariang k'anna ki Peisa-sou-an tou ymmid ki yttou-kakou-quan ki Næi, tou pattæni-hailen ki ymmid ki ta'utaou ka Heidang: anna ta irou-'ah ta limoulymmou.
Ka pattasasou-eih ta Ha gnau ka mariang k'anna ki Peisa-sou-an tou ymmid ki yttou-kakou-quan ki Næi, tou pattæni-hailen ki ymmid ki ta'utaou ka Heidang: anna ta irou-'ah ta limoulymmou.
S.TRANS: Ende dit Euangelinm des koninckrijcks sal in de gheheele werelt ghepredickt worden tot een getuygenille allen bolckeren : ende dan fal het eynde komen.
And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.
這天國的福音要傳遍天下，對萬民作見證，然後末期才來到。」 （可13‧14－23；路21‧20－24）

S.FORM: Jrou ka k'ytt'ei-moumi ta kakariskæus-in ki ni-ou-bulbul-en ka ni-pæsousou-en ti Daniel ka na Tama-mattæ'i-tan, tou itou-koua-an ka ni-pou-nni tou tatamd-den ki Alid (nda oum-gheilato ki Tama kting.)
Jrou ka k'ytt'ei-moumi ta kakariskæus-in ki ni-ou-bulbul-en ka ni-pæsousou-en ti Daniel ka na Tama-mattæ'i-tan, tou itou-koua-an ka ni-pou-nni tou tatamd-den ki Alid (nda oum-gheilato ki Tama kting.)
S.TRANS: Wanneer ghy dansult fien den grouwel der ber woeltinge waer ban ghesproken is door Daniel den Nopheet lkaende inde heylige plaetse (die sher] leeft die mercke daer op.) -
When ye therefore shall see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, stand in the holy place, (whoso readeth, let him understand:)
「你們看見先知但以理所說的『那行毀壞可憎的』站在聖地（讀這經的人須要會意）。

S.FORM: Tou kidi-k'anna na ma-mang ta tou Judea, da illipt-ah pou-bævoukkyu.
Tou kidi-k'anna na ma-mang ta tou Judea, da illipt-ah pou-bævoukkyu.
S.TRANS: Dat alsdan die in gudea zijn blieden op de ergen.
Then let them which be in Judaea flee into the mountains:
那時，在猶太的，應當逃到山上；

S.FORM: Na mamang ta a'ia-apang, ka assi mou-rarim ki ara-eih tyn ki mamang tou tallaghtyn.
Na mamang ta a'ia-apang, ka assi mou-rarim ki ara-eih tyn ki mamang tou tallaghtyn.
S.TRANS: Die op 't dack is en kome niet af om yer uyt Cijn huys wegh te nemen.
Let him which is on the housetop not come down to take any thing out of his house:
在房上的，不要下來拿家裏的東西；

S.FORM: Ka æ'ia-ouma-appa, nda assi sa-likough-ah ki ara-eih tyn ki koulamough.
Ka æ'ia-ouma-appa, nda assi sa-likough-ah ki ara-eih tyn ki koulamough.
S.TRANS: geweest ban het begin der werelt tot m toe nochoock niet zijn en al.
Neither let him which is in the field return back to take his clothes.
在田裏的，也不要回去取衣裳。

S.FORM: Ænnai ymoumi [ka jnæ-jna ka mavou ka pa-ouho tou wæi k'anna.
Ænnai ymoumi [ka jnæ-jna ka mavou ka pa-ouho tou wæi k'anna.
S.TRANS: Maer weeden bebuuchten endeden soogenden [brouwen] in die dagen.
And woe unto them that are with child, and to them that give suck in those days!
當那些日子，懷孕的和奶孩子的有禍了。

S.FORM: Nda mako-Alilid-a ka assi pavut-auh ta illipt-ei-moumi rou amighan, rou wai lava ka pæi-habab'æn.
Nda mako-Alilid-a ka assi pavut-auh ta illipt-ei-moumi rou amighan, rou wai lava ka pæi-habab'æn.
S.TRANS: Doch bidt dat uwe blucht niet en geschiede des winters noch op eenen bath.
But pray ye that your flight be not in the winter, neither on the sabbath day:
你們應當祈求，叫你們逃走的時候，不遇見冬天或是安息日。

S.FORM: Kairou'ah dou anna ta sa-samkan ki bulbul-en ka malouas irang, ka ni-aousi ki komma-hyn na siæugh ki kidi ki naunamou ki Nai tou kidi-appa hnyn, ka aousi. al-appa dou roumang.
Kairou'ah dou anna ta sa-samkan ki bulbul-en ka malouas irang, ka ni-aousi ki komma-hyn na siæugh ki kidi ki naunamou ki Nai tou kidi-appa hnyn, ka aousi. al-appa dou roumang.
S.TRANS: + Want als dan sal moote berdruckinge wesen
For then shall be great tribulation, such as was not since the beginning of the world to this time, no, nor ever shall be.
因為那時必有大災難，從世界的起頭直到如今，沒有這樣的災難，後來也必沒有。

S.FORM: Ka rou ynna papahkipo-en ta kidi ki wæi, assi paka-riang-auh ta kamamang ka vaät: rå alei ki ni-peri papahkyppo-eih ta wa'i k'anna.
Ka rou ynna papahkipo-en ta kidi ki wæi, assi paka-riang-auh ta kamamang ka vaät: rå alei ki ni-peri papahkyppo-eih ta wa'i k'anna.
S.TRANS: Ende foo die dagen niet berkort en wierden geen bleefch en soude behouden worden : maer om Der Uytberkorene wille sullen die dagen berkort worden.
And except those days should be shortened, there should no flesh be saved: but for the elect's sake those days shall be shortened.
若不減少那日子，凡有血氣的總沒有一個得救的；只是為選民，那日子必減少了。

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna rou mat-tæ'i-k'ma-ah-hynna-lava ta tima-mang ki sou ymoumi-æn, Kytt'ei, tou hia ta ti thristus, tou hynna lava, ynna tnamsing-da.
Tou kidi k'anna rou mat-tæ'i-k'ma-ah-hynna-lava ta tima-mang ki sou ymoumi-æn, Kytt'ei, tou hia ta ti thristus, tou hynna lava, ynna tnamsing-da.
S.TRANS: Alsdan fo yemant tot ulieden sal seggen Siet Hieris de Chaistus of daer en gelooft het niet.
Then if any man shall say unto you, Lo, here is Christ, or there; believe it not.
那時，若有人對你們說：『基督在這裏』，或說：『基督在那裏』，你們不要信！

S.FORM: Ka æhpit-ah ta mabatoung ka souh-æhristus, ka souhta Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka pamt-ah ki pouka-kidi-en ka yrrang, ki na ryngei-appa ki ourynghauen, komn-ap-pa hynna ka pataurahei-auh nein mrou ilpoughin ka ni-peri-da.

Ka æhpit-ah ta mabatoung ka souh-æhristus, ka souhta Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka pamt-ah ki pouka-kidi-en ka yrrang, ki na ryngei-appa ki ourynghauen, komn-ap-pa hynna ka pataurahei-auh nein mrou ilpoughin ka ni-peri-da.
S.TRANS: Want datr sullen balsche fche Chiilti ende balfche Propheren opstaen ende sulen groote teeckenen ende wonderheden doen also dat sp (indien het mogelick ware) oock de uptberkorene fouden berlepden.
For there shall arise false Christs, and false prophets, and shall shew great signs and wonders; insomuch that, if it were possible, they shall deceive the very elect.
因為假基督、假先知將要起來，顯大神蹟、大奇事，倘若能行，連選民也就迷惑了。

S.FORM: K'ytt'i, ni-pattæ'i-tan-en-au-kamou-râ.
K'ytt'i, ni-pattæ'i-tan-en-au-kamou-râ.
S.TRANS: Stetick hebbe [het]u boorleght.
Behold, I have told you before.
看哪，我預先告訴你們了。

S.FORM: Ka tou pattæ'i-k'ma-hynna-eih nein ki sou ymoumi-en, K'yt-t'ei, a'ia-poulah ta teni, ynna tpa-panah: K'ytt'ei, æ'ia-las ta teni tourbo, ynna tnamsing.
Ka tou pattæ'i-k'ma-hynna-eih nein ki sou ymoumi-en, K'yt-t'ei, a'ia-poulah ta teni, ynna tpa-panah: K'ytt'ei, æ'ia-las ta teni tourbo, ynna tnamsing.
S.TRANS: So ly dan tot u ullen seggm Siet hy 1s in de woeltijne en gaee niet nyt: Siet [by is Jin de binnen-kameren en gelooft het niet. :
Wherefore if they shall say unto you, Behold, he is in the desert; go not forth: behold, he is in the secret chambers; believe it not.
若有人對你們說：『看哪，基督在曠野裏』，你們不要出去！或說：『看哪，基督在內屋中』，你們不要信！

S.FORM: Nda mama ka makkæ-reia ta rykkat ka mæræmæh tou kidi-appa ki ta äraor-da, komm'al appa hynna ta ierrou-eih ki Alak ki kaeuloung.
Nda mama ka makkæ-reia ta rykkat ka mæræmæh tou kidi-appa ki ta äraor-da, komm'al appa hynna ta ierrou-eih ki Alak ki kaeuloung.
S.TRANS: Want gelijk deblixem uptgaet ban het Oolten enDe sthijnt tot Het Westen also sal oock de tockomlte deg Soons des menschen wesen,
For as the lightning cometh out of the east, and shineth even unto the west; so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.
閃電從東邊發出，直照到西邊。人子降臨也要這樣。

S.FORM: Ka toumamang ta na kou-lau, pauaklakl-eih tou hynna ta ahkei
Ka toumamang ta na kou-lau, pauaklakl-eih tou hynna ta ahkei
S.TRANS: Wantalwaer het doode lichaem sal zijn daer sutle de arenden bergadert worde.
For wheresoever the carcase is, there will the eagles be gathered together.

S.FORM: Ka madys siäugh ki sa-samk-en ki oubulbul-en ki wæ'i k'anna, karimdim-eih ta wæ'i, ka assi matikanagh-ah ta voural, ka mouaryng-ah makka vullum ta attatalingei, ka pakylikalika-eih ta kailhgen ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.

Ka madys siäugh ki sa-samk-en ki oubulbul-en ki wæ'i k'anna, karimdim-eih ta wæ'i, ka assi matikanagh-ah ta voural, ka mouaryng-ah makka vullum ta attatalingei, ka pakylikalika-eih ta kailhgen ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANS: Ende terltont na de berdyuckinge die dagen sal de Sonne berduysiert worden ende de Mane en. sal haer schynsel niet geben ende de Sterren fullen ban den Hemel ballen ende de krachten der Hemelen sullen beweeght worden, .
Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken:
「那些日子的災難一過去，

S.FORM: Ka tou kidi ki anna mou-panæh-ah ta pou-kidi-en ki Alak ki kaeuloung tou vullum: ka tmangi-tangi-ah dou anna ta ym-dei-ati ki kavouyvouyllan ki Næt, ka kmyttæ-æh ki Alak ki ka'æu loung, dou ierroua tou pourararei ki vullum tou kailhgen ki kei rang-en ki kidi ka malouas.

Ka tou kidi ki anna mou-panæh-ah ta pou-kidi-en ki Alak ki kaeuloung tou vullum: ka tmangi-tangi-ah dou anna ta ym-dei-ati ki kavouyvouyllan ki Næt, ka kmyttæ-æh ki Alak ki ka'æu loung, dou ierroua tou pourararei ki vullum tou kailhgen ki kei rang-en ki kidi ka malouas.
S.TRANS: Ende alsdan sal inden Hemel berschynd het teecken Des Soons des mentfchen : ende dan sullen alle de 4 acyfiathten der aerde weenen jeil fullen den Sone des menscht fien komende op de wolcken des Hemels met groote kracht ende heerlickhept.

And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
那時，人子的兆頭要顯在天上，地上的萬族都要哀哭。他們要看見人子，有能力，有大榮耀，駕着天上的雲降臨。

S.FORM: Ka padingi-eih tyn ta Ta-ma-Gnæu tyn ki joep ki oeni-appa ka irang, ka papakoi lalau-ah ki ni-peri tyn, ki pagpæt ki ni-pak ka-koua-an ki vare-vare, na soe-tounnoun ki vullu-vullum tou kidi-appa ki limoulimou ki anna.

Ka padingi-eih tyn ta Ta-ma-Gnæu tyn ki joep ki oeni-appa ka irang, ka papakoi lalau-ah ki ni-peri tyn, ki pagpæt ki ni-pak ka-koua-an ki vare-vare, na soe-tounnoun ki vullu-vullum tou kidi-appa ki limoulimou ki anna.
S.TRANS: EndehysalsyneEngelenuptsenden met een Bafupne ban groot gelupt ende fn cullen syne uytberkorene by een bergaderen uyt de bier winden ban [ heteen] upterste der Hemelen tot [her ander] uptterlte der selbe.
And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
他要差遣使者，用號筒的大聲，將他的選民，從四方，從天這邊到天那邊，都招聚了來。」 （可13‧28－31；路21‧29－33）

S.FORM: . Ka madam-mou-mhga ki perænnæh ka lakæuoung-in ki pa myh kaulaul'an: Irou ka ma aukna ta pehil tyn, ka mou-sou rah ta hapa tyn, kalang'noumi ka a'ia hylli ta da'eulang.
. Ka madam-mou-mhga ki perænnæh ka lakæuoung-in ki pa myh kaulaul'an: Irou ka ma aukna ta pehil tyn, ka mou-sou rah ta hapa tyn, kalang'noumi ka a'ia hylli ta da'eulang.
S.TRANS: Ende leert ban ben bijgeboom dese ghelijckenisfe : Wanneet synen tack nu teer wordt ende de bladeren nytsprupten so weet ghy dat de Some; naby 18. _
Now learn a parable of the fig tree; When his branch is yet tender, and putteth forth leaves, ye know that summer is nigh:
「你們可以從無花果樹學個比方：當樹枝發嫩長葉的時候，你們就知道夏天近了。

S.FORM: Komm'appa-hynna ta y-moumi, jrou kytt'ei-moumi ta mamang katta, k'alangæu-moumi kaä'ia touk æia-ngatas ta anna.
Komm'appa-hynna ta ymoumi, jrou kytt'ei-moumi ta mamang katta, k'alangæu-moumi kaä'ia touk æia-ngatas ta anna.
S.TRANS: Alsooock ghylieden wanneer ghy alle dese dingen sult sten fo weet dat[her] naby 1g 0007 de dence.
So likewise ye, when ye shall see all these things, know that it is near, even at the doors.
這樣，你們看見這一切的事，也該知道人子近了，正在門口了。

S.FORM: Missing koun-nau-kamou, assi maliæuragh-ah ta kavouyl-lan katta, ka pahkahan-ato pamut ymdei-au kamamang k'anna.
Missing koun-nau-kamou, assi maliæuragh-ah ta kavouyl-lan katta, ka pahkahan-ato pamut ymdei-au kamamang k'anna.
S.TRANS: PYoorwae? ick fegge u dit geslachte en sal geenfins boorbp gaen tot dat alle dee dinghen cullen ghefchiede3yn.
Verily I say unto you, This generation shall not pass, till all these things be fulfilled.
我實在告訴你們，這世代還沒有過去，這些事都要成就。

S.FORM: Maliæuragh-ah ta vulluma ki Nai, ra assimaliæuragh-ah ta kasou-en-au.
Maliæuragh-ah ta vulluma ki Nai, ra assimaliæuragh-ah ta kasou-en-au.
S.TRANS: De Hemel ende de Aerde sullen boorbp gaen mae? mijne woorderi en sullen geenfins boorby gam.
Heaven and earth shall pass away, but my words shall not pass away.

S.FORM: Râ kidi ki wæ'i ki tæ'lei-appa k'anna assi mou-mbga ta ti-mamang, assi-appa ta Tama-Gnau ka tou tounnoun ki vullum, dyk ka Raraman-au tou saat.
Râ kidi ki wæ'i ki tæ'lei-appa k'anna assi mou-mbga ta ti-mamang, assi-appa ta Tama-Gnau ka tou tounnoun ki vullum, dyk ka Raraman-au tou saat.
S.TRANS: Doch ban dien dagh ende yyre en weet niemandt dock niet de Engelen der Heme melen dan mijn Dader alleen
But of that day and hour knoweth no man, no, not the angels of heaven, but my Father only.
「但那日子，那時辰，沒有人知道，連天上的使者也不知道，子也不知道，惟獨父知道。

S.FORM: Ka mama ki na wæï ti Nou, komm'al-appa-hynna ta ier-rou-eih ki Alak ki kaeuloung.
Ka mama ki na wæï ti Nou, komm'al-appa-hynna ta ier-rou-eih ki Alak ki kaeuloung.
S.TRANS: Ende geliick de dagen No? [waren, ] alsoo sal oock tin de tockomste ban den on des Menichen. |
But as the days of Noe were, so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.
挪亞的日子怎樣，人子降臨也要怎樣。

S.FORM: Nda mama ka komma-hynna ki kidi dou aousi-appa ta vaha ka ierrang, ka ni-mavok, ni-myt, nipoutbung, nipapoutbung ta neni, tou kidi-appa ki wæ'i k'anna ka ni-ourbo ti Nou tou sa to [ka ni-pei-avang.]
Nda mama ka komma-hynna ki kidi dou aousi-appa ta vaha ka ierrang, ka ni-mavok, ni-myt, nipoutbung, nipapoutbung ta neni, tou kidi-appa ki wæ'i k'anna ka ni-ourbo ti Nou tou sa to [ka ni-pei-avang.]
S.TRANS: Want geliick p waren in de daghen boor De Zundt-bloede etende ende drinckende fouwendt ende n houwtlicke uptghebende tot den dagh toe in welcken Not in de Arke gingh:
For as in the days that were before the flood they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day that Noe entered into the ark,
當洪水以前的日子，人照常吃喝嫁娶，直到挪亞進方舟的那日；

S.FORM: Ka assi nein ni-kalang tou kidi-appa k'anna ka iroua ta vaha ka yrrang, ka nimæeu-ymmid mæ-eu-mia neini-æn: komm'al-appa hynna ta ierrou-'eih ki Alak ki ka'euloung.
Ka assi nein ni-kalang tou kidi-appa k'anna ka iroua ta vaha ka yrrang, ka nimæeu-ymmid mæ-eu-mia neini-æn: komm'al-appa hynna ta ierrou-'eih ki Alak ki ka'euloung.
S.TRANS: Ende en bekenden het niet tot dat de Zundtbloedt guam ende haer alle wech nam: alsoo sal oock zijn de tockomlte des Soons des menichen. |
And knew not until the flood came, and took them all away; so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.
不知不覺洪水來了，把他們全都沖去。人子降臨也要這樣。

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna æ'ia-ou-ma-'æh ta rarouha ki voual, ka ara auh ta saat, ka pa-itou-koua-auh ta saät.
Tou kidi k'anna æ'ia-ou-ma-'æh ta rarouha ki voual, ka ara auh ta saat, ka pa-itou-koua-auh ta saät.
S.TRANS: Aisdan sullender twee sp den acker ] de een al genghenomen ende de ander fal berlaten worden.
Then shall two be in the field; the one shall be taken, and the other left.
那時，兩個人在田裏，取去一個，撇下一個。

S.FORM: Darouha ka jna-jna ka mahalting-ah tou kahalting-an, saät ta ara-auh, saät ta pa-itouka-koua-auh.
Darouha ka jna-jna ka mahalting-ah tou kahalting-an, saät ta ara-auh, saät ta pa-itouka-koua-auh.
S.TRANS: Dae) sullentwee [brouwenJmalen in den menlen de eene sal aengenomen ende de andere sal berlaten worden.
Two women shall be grinding at the mill; the one shall be taken, and the other left.
兩個女人推磨，取去一個，撇下一個。

S.FORM: Anna ta mahama-i alei ka asli-moumi ou-mhgan ta tælei ka manno ka ierrou-eih ki Mei-rang-oumi.
Anna ta mahama-i alei ka asli-moumi ou-mhgan ta tælei ka manno ka ierrou-eih ki Mei-rang-oumi.
S.TRANS: Waeckt dan want ghy en weet niet in welcke upre uwe Heere komen sal; eere des hups gheweten
Watch therefore: for ye know not what hour your Lord doth come.
所以，你們要警醒，因為不知道你們的主是哪一天來到。

S.FORM: Nda ou-mhgu ta anna, irou ni-oumhgan ki Tæ'i-tallagh tou souajam-en ka papynna ta irouah ta matelliau, ynna tyn mauä-, ynna tyn assi pæ-kari-an-ei ta tallagh tyn,
Nda ou-mhgu ta anna, irou ni-oumhgan ki Tæ'i-tallagh tou souajam-en ka papynna ta irouah ta matelliau, ynna tyn mauä-, ynna tyn assi pæ-kari-an-ei ta tallagh tyn,
S.TRANS: Hadde inwelcke nacht-wake de dief komen oude hy fonde gewaeckt hebben mde en foude shjn huys niet hebben laten doorgraben. |
But know this, that if the goodman of the house had known in what watch the thief would come, he would have watched, and would not have suffered his house to be broken up.
家主若知道幾更天有賊來，就必警醒，不容人挖透房屋；這是你們所知道的。

S.FORM: Alei ki atta, nda t'ma-do-appa tmanang ta ymoumi, alei ka tou kidi ki tælei ka assi-mou-mi habauat-in, irou-ah ta Alak ki ka-euloung.
Alei ki atta, nda t'ma-do-appa tmanang ta ymoumi, alei ka tou kidi ki tælei ka assi-moumi habauat-in, irou-ah ta Alak ki ka-euloung.
S.TRANS: Daerom rije oock ghy bereyt want in welcke upre ghy t niet en meynt sal de Sone des Menschen komen. w |
Therefore be ye also ready: for in such an hour as ye think not the Son of man cometh.
所以，你們也要預備，因為你們想不到的時候，人子就來了。」 （路12‧41－48）

S.FORM: Annata timang ta kouncia ka mashut ka mat-allah-kau, ka ni-pæsibavau-en ki Meirang tyn ki sat katallag-han tyn, alei ki phæ anei neini-æn ki kan-næuh tou kidi ka mariang.
Annata timang ta kouncia ka mashut ka mat-allah-kau, ka ni-pæsibavau-en ki Meirang tyn ki sat katallag-han tyn, alei ki phæ anei neini-æn ki kan-næuh tou kidi ka mariang.
S.TRANS: Wie is dan de getrouwe ende boorsichtige dienstKnecht den welcken syn Heere obe: shne dienst-boden ghelteldt heeft om hen-lieden [haer] boedtsel te geben ter rechter thdt.,
Who then is a faithful and wise servant, whom his lord hath made ruler over his household, to give them meat in due season?
「誰是忠心有見識的僕人，為主人所派，管理家裏的人，按時分糧給他們呢？

S.FORM: Tama-tæi-riang ta koun-cia kanna, ka ka-bælei-auh ki Meirang tyn, dou iroua, ta mei-k'ma hynna.
Tama-tæi-riang ta koun-cia kanna, ka ka-bælei-auh ki Meirang tyn, dou iroua, ta mei-k'ma hynna.
S.TRANS: Saligh is die dienltknecht welcken syn Heere Komende sal binden alfoo doende.
Blessed is that servant, whom his lord when he cometh shall find so doing.
主人來到，看見他這樣行，那僕人就有福了。

S.FORM: Missing koun-nan-kamou ka pa-sibavau-ah tyni-æn ki ym-mid ki hourup tyn.
Missing koun-nan-kamou ka pa-sibavau-ah tyni-æn ki ym-mid ki hourup tyn.
S.TRANS: Doorwaer ick fegge u dat hy hem salsetten ober alle lijne goederen.
Verily I say unto you, That he shall make him ruler over all his goods.
我實在告訴你們，主人要派他管理一切所有的。

S.FORM: Heirou-râ mattæ i-rmir-ah tou tintin tyn ta kouncia ka masa muk, Malanga iroua ta Meirang au:
Heirou-râ mattæ i-rmir-ah tou tintin tyn ta kouncia ka masa muk, Malanga iroua ta Meirang au:
S.TRANS: Maer so die quade dienstknecht in lijn herte fonde seggen Mijn Heere bertoeft te oment
But and if that evil servant shall say in his heart, My lord delayeth his coming;
倘若那惡僕心裏說：『我的主人必來得遲』，

S.FORM: Ka dou makka-naunamou bukbuk ki kouncia ka talalam tyn, ka mi-sal-ah mavok, mou sal-ah myt ki Tama-yt.
Ka dou makka-naunamou bukbuk ki kouncia ka talalam tyn, ka mi-sal-ah mavok, mou sal-ah myt ki Tama-yt.
S.TRANS: Ende soude beginnen [kjae] mede-dienfknechts te Haen ende te eten efi te drincKen met de dronckaerts.
And shall begin to smite his fellowservants, and to eat and drink with the drunken;
就動手打他的同伴，又和酒醉的人一同吃喝。

S.FORM: Anna ta jerrou-ah ta Meirang ka tamia ki kouncia k'anna tou wai ki assi tyn amamat-in, tou kidi-appa ki tælei ka assi tyn oumhgan.
Anna ta jerrou-ah ta Meirang ka tamia ki kouncia k'anna tou wai ki assi tyn amamat-in, tou kidi-appa ki tælei ka assi tyn oumhgan.
S.TRANS: Soo sal de Heere defes dienstknechts komen ten dage in welcken hy [hem] met en berwacht ende ter upre die hy niet en weet.
The lord of that servant shall come in a day when he looketh not for him, and in an hour that he is not aware of,
在想不到的日子，不知道的時辰，那僕人的主人要來，

S.FORM: Ka pasahpiagh-ah tyni-æn, ka pa-itousal-ah ki atægh tyn ki panninni-en ki rÿh ki sou. Tou hynna-al-ato ta tangi-tangi-en ki pat-iting-en-appa ki waligh. Kararouha kytti-an'æb ki rymma. ki. bæh ki soulat.

Ka pasahpiagh-ah tyni-æn, ka pa-itousal-ah ki atægh tyn ki panninni-en ki rÿh ki sou. Tou hynna-al-ato ta tangi-tangi-en ki pat-iting-en-appa ki waligh. Kararouha kytti-an'æb ki rymma. ki. bæh ki soulat.
S.TRANS: Ende al hem affcheyden ende shn deel setten met de ghebepnlde.Dae sal weeninghe zijn ende knersinge der tanden
And shall cut him asunder, and appoint him his portion with the hypocrites: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
重重地處治他，定他和假冒為善的人同罪；在那裏必要哀哭切齒了。」
